entry.title: Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages
entry.content: "Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages" while running the S_ALR_87013542 (Project System) report. For the Post Goods Issue posting, we are using movement type 281 Q with the cost center assigned as the account assignment object. Could this issue be related to the report output type, or is there another possible cause?  As requested by the business, could you confirm whether it is possible to display line items at the Cost Center level?

entry.title: Re: [S/4HANA Cloud] How to Transfer a Customer Line Item...
entry.content: Hi Divyesh, Thank you for your prompt response. I now understand that this can be achieved by posting two journal entries via an intermediary clearing G/L account. I would like to confirm one point. Since the first posting is not a clearing via an incoming payment but rather a transfer posting from the customer balance to the clearing account, could you confirm whether my understanding is correct that the "Clear Incoming Payments" app (App ID: F0773), which I was originally considering, would not be used in this case? Also, could you please let me know the specific app(s)/transaction code(s) (T-Codes) to be used for the first and second postings, respectively? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: PO Change Message misbehavior
entry.content: Check whether you need to carry out code corrections as recommended in SAP note 2352570

entry.title: Unable to Set Payment Terms and Payment Method for Vendor Residual Items in F1367
entry.content:
When using Clear Outgoing Payments (F1367) to clear customer and vendor open items and post the difference as a vendor residual item, it is not possible to specify arbitrary Payment Terms or Payment Method values for the residual item.

In addition, after posting, the Payment Terms and Payment Method fields of the generated vendor line item remain blank.

Is it possible to assign specific Payment Terms and Payment Method values to a vendor residual item created through Clear Outgoing Payments (F1367)? If so, please advise on the required configuration or procedure.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Myinbox make a field clickable(hyperlink)
entry.content:
If this is a decision task, try adding an HTML link code (as plain text) directly into the task description; as:

<a href="mylink.com">Test link</a>

In our on-premise S4 Hana system, such texts are displayed as regular links in Fiori MyInbox:

If that works, you can put a any static or dynamically generated URL there.

entry.title: Re: Clarification on Personalization Migration from SAP F...
entry.content:
Hello,

Fiori 2 → Fiori 3 User Personalization Migration

What is Retained
Personalization                        Retained?
Theme                                              Yes
User Defaults                                 Yes
Favorites                                      With conditions
Tile Order / Groups Layout      Not automatic

Migration Options

My Home Import (Post-2023 FPS01): First login to My Home shows a message strip → click "Import Apps Now" — one-time action only.
/UIF/MIGRATE_FES_PERSO: Transport-based migration across clients/systems (SAP Note 2789848).
/UI2/FLP_GTP: Groups → Pages content migration (role level, not user personalization level).

Please note that SAP does not provide a mass migration tool for user personalization from Groups to Spaces & Pages.

Following SAP KBA for your reference as well:
3448332 Documentation for Setting Up My Home in SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01
3603720 Copying Fiori Home Page Personalization (Export/Import via My Home Advanced tab)
3436068 Fiori migration from Classic to Spaces and Pages Mode Info on Importing Personalization
3322675 Guidelines on Migrating Fiori Launchpad from Groups to Spaces & Pages
3368323 How to import Apps and Personalizations from Classic Home Page to My Home (Post S/4HANA 2022)
2789848 Migration report for homepage and SAPUI5 application personalization (/UIF/MIGRATE_FES_PERSO)

Best regards,
Joe
